name: Quarterly CMDB Health Assessment Workflow
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio with read-only CMDB analysis; Flow Designer subflows for any write action with approval
trigger: Scheduled quarterly or manual assessment request from a platform owner
businessOutcome: Help the platform team identify CMDB health issues per CI class and create a prioritized remediation plan that respects change control and avoids any direct CMDB write from the agent.
steps: Capture assessment scope, target CI classes, and critical-service list.
Read CMDB Health Dashboard signals and Discovery Status indicators within the scope.
Cross-check Identification & Reconciliation rule effectiveness per class.
Surface orphans by joining cmdb_ci against cmdb_ci_service.
Group issues by business impact and remediation effort with affected record counts.
Draft a remediation plan, separating read-only fixes from rule-change proposals.
Route any rule change to a Flow Designer subflow with Platform Owner approval.
Produce an executive summary and a practitioner task list with owner placeholders.
approvalPoints: Before sending the report outside the platform team
failureStates: Empty scope: agent returns a clarification request and does not proceed.
Tool returns more than the configured row cap: agent paginates and logs the cap event for review.
Service Mapping data missing: agent flags the class as not eligible for orphan detection and continues with the others.
auditNotes: Read-only mode enforced by tool whitelist; any write attempt is logged and blocked.
Quarterly review board minutes archived alongside the report.
Before-after metrics mandatory on every rule change implemented post-review.
tests: Read-only mode produces recommendations but no writes.
High-risk class changes require approval and cannot be auto-applied.
Synthetic 1k-CI duplicate dataset surfaces all duplicates within 5 percent.
Report generation under 90 seconds p95 on sub-prod.
